verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur Joseph ductus est in Ægyptum, emitque eum Putiphar eunuchus Pharaonis, princeps exercitus, vir ægyptius, de manu Ismaëlitarum, a quibus perductus erat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיוֹסֵ֖ף הוּרַ֣ד מִצְרָ֑יְמָה וַיִּקְנֵ֡הוּ פּוֹטִיפַר֩ סְרִ֨יס פַּרְעֹ֜ה שַׂ֤ר הַטַּבָּחִים֙ אִ֣ישׁ מִצְרִ֔י מִיַּד֙ הַיִּשְׁמְעֵאלִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר הוֹרִדֻ֖הוּ שָֽׁמָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joseph was brought into Egypt, and Putiphar, an eunuch of Pharao, chief captain of the army, an Egyptian, bought him of the Ismaelites, by whom he was brought.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Josef vietiin alas Egyptiin: ja Potiphar Egyptiläinen Pharaon kamaripalvelia ja huovinhaltia osti hänen Ismaelilaisilta, jotka hänen sinne alas vieneet olivat.
verses.king_james: And Joseph was brought down to Egypt; and Potiphar, an officer of Pharaoh, captain of the guard, an Egyptian, bought him of the hands of the Ishmeelites, which had brought him down thither.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuitque Dominus cum eo, et erat vir in cunctis prospere agens : habitavitque in domo domini sui,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֤י יְהֹוָה֙ אֶת־יוֹסֵ֔ף וַיְהִ֖י אִ֣ישׁ מַצְלִ֑יחַ וַיְהִ֕י בְּבֵ֖ית אֲדֹנָ֥יו הַמִּצְרִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord was with him, and he was a prosperous man in all things: and he dwelt in his master's house:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra oli Josephin kanssa, ja hän oli onnellinen mies, ja oli isäntänsä Egyptiläisen huoneessa.
verses.king_james: And the Lord was with Joseph, and he was a prosperous man; and he was in the house of his master the Egyptian.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui optime noverat Dominum esse cum eo, et omnia, quæ gerebat, ab eo dirigi in manu illius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣רְא אֲדֹנָ֔יו כִּ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה אִתּ֑וֹ וְכֹל֙ אֲשֶׁר־ה֣וּא עֹשֶׂ֔ה יְהֹוָ֖ה מַצְלִ֥יחַ בְּיָדֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who knew very well that the Lord was with him, and made all that he did to prosper in his hand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen isäntänsä näki, että Herra oli hänen kanssansa; sillä kaikki, mitä hän teki, antoi Herra menestyä hänen kädessänsä.
verses.king_james: And his master saw that the Lord was with him, and that the Lord made all that he did to prosper in his hand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Invenitque Joseph gratiam coram domino suo, et ministrabat ei : a quo præpositus omnibus gubernabat creditam sibi domum, et universa quæ ei tradita fuerant :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּמְצָ֨א יוֹסֵ֥ף חֵ֛ן בְּעֵינָ֖יו וַיְשָׁ֣רֶת אֹת֑וֹ וַיַּפְקִדֵ֙הוּ֙ עַל־בֵּית֔וֹ וְכׇל־יֶשׁ־ל֖וֹ נָתַ֥ן בְּיָדֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joseph found favour in the sight of his master, and ministered to him: and being set over all by him, he governed the house committed to him, and all things that were delivered to him:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin että hän löysi armon hänen edessänsä, ja tuli hänen palveliaksensa: ja hän asetti hänen huoneensa ylitse, ja kaikki mitä hänellä oli, antoi hän hänen käteensä.
verses.king_james: And Joseph found grace in his sight, and he served him: and he made him overseer over his house, and all that he had he put into his hand.

verses.latin_vulgate: benedixitque Dominus domui Ægyptii propter Joseph, et multiplicavit tam in ædibus quam in agris cunctam ejus substantiam :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֡י מֵאָז֩ הִפְקִ֨יד אֹת֜וֹ בְּבֵית֗וֹ וְעַל֙ כׇּל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר יֶשׁ־ל֔וֹ וַיְבָ֧רֶךְ יְהֹוָ֛ה אֶת־בֵּ֥ית הַמִּצְרִ֖י בִּגְלַ֣ל יוֹסֵ֑ף וַיְהִ֞י בִּרְכַּ֤ת יְהֹוָה֙ בְּכׇל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר יֶשׁ־ל֔וֹ בַּבַּ֖יִת וּבַשָּׂדֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord blessed the house of the Egyptian for Joseph's sake, and multiplied all his substance, both at home and in the fields.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja siitä ajasta kuin hän oli hänen pannut huoneensa ja kaiken tavaransa päälle, siunasi Herra sen Egyptiläisen huoneen Josephin tähden, ja Herran siunaus oli kaikissa niissä, jotka hänellä kotona ja kedolla olivat.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass from the time that he had made him overseer in his house, and over all that he had, that the Lord blessed the Egyptian’s house for Joseph’s sake; and the blessing of the Lord was upon all that he had in the house, and in the field.

verses.latin_vulgate: nec quidquam aliud noverat, nisi panem quo vescebatur. Erat autem Joseph pulchra facie, et decorus aspectu.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲזֹ֣ב כׇּל־אֲשֶׁר־לוֹ֮ בְּיַד־יוֹסֵף֒ וְלֹא־יָדַ֤ע אִתּוֹ֙ מְא֔וּמָה כִּ֥י אִם־הַלֶּ֖חֶם אֲשֶׁר־ה֣וּא אוֹכֵ֑ל וַיְהִ֣י יוֹסֵ֔ף יְפֵה־תֹ֖אַר וִיפֵ֥ה מַרְאֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Neither knew he any other thing, but the bread which he ate. And Joseph was of a beautiful countenance, and comely to behold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden antoi hän kaikki Josephin haltuun, mitä hänellä oli, ja ei tiedustellut mitään häneltä, paitsi sitä ruokaa, jonka hän söi. Ja Joseph oli kauniin luontoinen, ja ihana kasvoilta.
verses.king_james: And he left all that he had in Joseph’s hand; and he knew not ought he had, save the bread which he did eat. And Joseph was a goodly person, and well favoured.

verses.latin_vulgate: Post multos itaque dies injecit domina sua oculos suos in Joseph, et ait : Dormi mecum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֗י אַחַר֙ הַדְּבָרִ֣ים הָאֵ֔לֶּה וַתִּשָּׂ֧א אֵֽשֶׁת־אֲדֹנָ֛יו אֶת־עֵינֶ֖יהָ אֶל־יוֹסֵ֑ף וַתֹּ֖אמֶר שִׁכְבָ֥ה עִמִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And after many days, his mistress cast her eyes on Joseph, and said: Lie with me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tapahtui tämän jälkeen, että hänen isäntänsä emännän silmät paloivat Josephin päälle, ja sanoi: makaa minun kanssani.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass after these things, that his master’s wife cast her eyes upon Joseph; and she said, Lie with me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui nequaquam acquiescens operi nefario, dixit ad eam : Ecce dominus meus, omnibus mihi traditis, ignorat quid habeat in domo sua :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְמָאֵ֓ן ׀ וַיֹּ֙אמֶר֙ אֶל־אֵ֣שֶׁת אֲדֹנָ֔יו הֵ֣ן אֲדֹנִ֔י לֹא־יָדַ֥ע אִתִּ֖י מַה־בַּבָּ֑יִת וְכֹ֥ל אֲשֶׁר־יֶשׁ־ל֖וֹ נָתַ֥ן בְּיָדִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: But he in no wise consenting to that wicked act said to her: Behold, my master hath delivered all things to me, and knoweth not what he hath in his own house:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta hän kielsi, ja sanoi isäntänsä emännälle: katso, minun isäntäni ei tiedusta minulta, mitä huoneessa on, ja kaikki mitä hänellä on, antoi hän minun käteeni.
verses.king_james: But he refused, and said unto his master’s wife, Behold, my master wotteth not what is with me in the house, and he hath committed all that he hath to my hand;

verses.latin_vulgate: nec quidquam est quod non in mea sit potestate, vel non tradiderit mihi, præter te, quæ uxor ejus es : quomodo ergo possum hoc malum facere, et peccare in Deum meum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵינֶ֨נּוּ גָד֜וֹל בַּבַּ֣יִת הַזֶּה֮ מִמֶּ֒נִּי֒ וְלֹֽא־חָשַׂ֤ךְ מִמֶּ֙נִּי֙ מְא֔וּמָה כִּ֥י אִם־אוֹתָ֖ךְ בַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר אַתְּ־אִשְׁתּ֑וֹ וְאֵ֨יךְ אֶֽעֱשֶׂ֜ה הָרָעָ֤ה הַגְּדֹלָה֙ הַזֹּ֔את וְחָטָ֖אתִי לֵֽאלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Neither is there any thing which is not in my power, or that he hath not delivered to me, but thee, who art his wife; how then can I do this wicked thing, and sin against my God?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei pidä hän itseänsä tässä huoneessa suurempana minua, ei myös ole hän kieltänyt minulta mitään, paitsi sinun, siinä kuin sinä olet hänen emäntänsä: kuinka siis minä niin paljon pahaa tekisin ja rikkoisin Jumalaa vastaan?
verses.king_james: There is none greater in this house than I; neither hath he kept back any thing from me but thee, because thou art his wife: how then can I do this great wickedness, and sin against God?

verses.latin_vulgate: Hujuscemodi verbis per singulos dies, et mulier molesta erat adolescenti : et ille recusabat stuprum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֕י כְּדַבְּרָ֥הּ אֶל־יוֹסֵ֖ף י֣וֹם ׀ י֑וֹם וְלֹא־שָׁמַ֥ע אֵלֶ֛יהָ לִשְׁכַּ֥ב אֶצְלָ֖הּ לִהְי֥וֹת עִמָּֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: With such words as these day by day, both the woman was importunate with the young man, and he refused the adultery.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta hän piti jokapäivä senkaltaiset puheet Josephin kanssa; mutta ei hän totellut maata hänen kanssansa, eli olla hänen kanssansa.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, as she spake to Joseph day by day, that he hearkened not unto her, to lie by her, or to be with her.

verses.latin_vulgate: Accidit autem quadam die ut intraret Joseph domum, et operis quippiam absque arbitris faceret :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ כְּהַיּ֣וֹם הַזֶּ֔ה וַיָּבֹ֥א הַבַּ֖יְתָה לַעֲשׂ֣וֹת מְלַאכְתּ֑וֹ וְאֵ֨ין אִ֜ישׁ מֵאַנְשֵׁ֥י הַבַּ֛יִת שָׁ֖ם בַּבָּֽיִת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now it happened on a certain day, that Joseph went into the house, and was doing some business, without any man with him:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tapahtui yhtenä päivänä, että Joseph meni huoneesen askaroitsemaan; ja ei ollut yksikään perheestä läsnä.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass about this time, that Joseph went into the house to do his business; and there was none of the men of the house there within.

verses.latin_vulgate: et illa, apprehensa lacinia vestimenti ejus, diceret : Dormi mecum. Qui relicto in manu ejus pallio fugit, et egressus est foras.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּתְפְּשֵׂ֧הוּ בְּבִגְד֛וֹ לֵאמֹ֖ר שִׁכְבָ֣ה עִמִּ֑י וַיַּעֲזֹ֤ב בִּגְדוֹ֙ בְּיָדָ֔הּ וַיָּ֖נׇס וַיֵּצֵ֥א הַחֽוּצָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And she catching the skirt of his garment, said: Lie with me. But he leaving the garment in her hand, fled, and went out.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän tarttui hänen hameesensa, sanoen: makaa minun kanssani. Mutta hän jätti hameensa hänen käteensä, ja pakeni, ja meni ulos.
verses.king_james: And she caught him by his garment, saying, Lie with me: and he left his garment in her hand, and fled, and got him out.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque vidisset mulier vestem in manibus suis, et se esse contemptam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ כִּרְאוֹתָ֔הּ כִּֽי־עָזַ֥ב בִּגְד֖וֹ בְּיָדָ֑הּ וַיָּ֖נׇס הַחֽוּצָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when the woman saw the garment in her hands, and herself disregarded,
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska hän näki, että hän jätti hameensa hänen käteensä, ja pakeni ulos:
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, when she saw that he had left his garment in her hand, and was fled forth,

verses.latin_vulgate: vocavit ad se homines domus suæ, et ait ad eos : En introduxit virum hebræum, ut illuderet nobis : ingressus est ad me, ut coiret mecum : cumque ego succlamassem,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּקְרָ֞א לְאַנְשֵׁ֣י בֵיתָ֗הּ וַתֹּ֤אמֶר לָהֶם֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר רְא֗וּ הֵ֥בִיא לָ֛נוּ אִ֥ישׁ עִבְרִ֖י לְצַ֣חֶק בָּ֑נוּ בָּ֤א אֵלַי֙ לִשְׁכַּ֣ב עִמִּ֔י וָאֶקְרָ֖א בְּק֥וֹל גָּדֽוֹל׃
verses.douay_rheims: She called to her the men of her house, and said to them: See, he hath brought in a Hebrew, to abuse us: he came in to me, to lie with me; and when I cried out,
verses.finnish_biblia: Huusi hän perhettänsä, ja sanoi heille: katsokaat, hän on tuonut meille yhden Hebrealaisen miehen, saattamaan meitä häpiään: hän tuli minun tyköni makaamaan minun kanssani; mutta minä huusin korkialla äänellä.
verses.king_james: That she called unto the men of her house, and spake unto them, saying, See, he hath brought in an Hebrew unto us to mock us; he came in unto me to lie with me, and I cried with a loud voice:

verses.latin_vulgate: et audisset vocem meam, reliquit pallium quod tenebam, et fugit foras.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֣י כְשׇׁמְע֔וֹ כִּֽי־הֲרִימֹ֥תִי קוֹלִ֖י וָאֶקְרָ֑א וַיַּעֲזֹ֤ב בִּגְדוֹ֙ אֶצְלִ֔י וַיָּ֖נׇס וַיֵּצֵ֥א הַחֽוּצָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he heard my voice, he left the garment that I held, and got him out.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja koska hän kuuli, että minä riahdin ja huusin, jätti hän minulle hameensa, pakeni ja meni ulos.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, when he heard that I lifted up my voice and cried, that he left his garment with me, and fled, and got him out.

verses.latin_vulgate: In argumentum ergo fidei retentum pallium ostendit marito revertenti domum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתַּנַּ֥ח בִּגְד֖וֹ אֶצְלָ֑הּ עַד־בּ֥וֹא אֲדֹנָ֖יו אֶל־בֵּיתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For a proof therefore of her fidelity, she kept the garment, and shewed it to her husband when he returned home:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin hän piti hänen hameensa tykönänsä, siihenasti kuin hänen isäntänsä kotia tuli,
verses.king_james: And she laid up his garment by her, until his lord came home.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ait : Ingressus est ad me servus hebræus quem adduxisti, ut illuderet mihi :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתְּדַבֵּ֣ר אֵלָ֔יו כַּדְּבָרִ֥ים הָאֵ֖לֶּה לֵאמֹ֑ר בָּֽא־אֵלַ֞י הָעֶ֧בֶד הָֽעִבְרִ֛י אֲשֶׁר־הֵבֵ֥אתָ לָּ֖נוּ לְצַ֥חֶק בִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And said: The Hebrew servant, whom thou hast brought, came to me to abuse me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja puhui hänelle ne sanat, sanoen: Hebrealainen palvelia, jonkas olet meille tuonut, tuli minun tyköni, saattamaan minua häpiään.
verses.king_james: And she spake unto him according to these words, saying, The Hebrew servant, which thou hast brought unto us, came in unto me to mock me:

verses.latin_vulgate: cumque audisset me clamare, reliquit pallium quod tenebam, et fugit foras.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֕י כַּהֲרִימִ֥י קוֹלִ֖י וָאֶקְרָ֑א וַיַּעֲזֹ֥ב בִּגְד֛וֹ אֶצְלִ֖י וַיָּ֥נׇס הַחֽוּצָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when he heard me cry, he left the garment which I held, and fled out.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta koska minä riahdin ja huusin, jätti hän minulle hameensa ja pakeni ulos.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, as I lifted up my voice and cried, that he left his garment with me, and fled out.

verses.latin_vulgate: His auditis dominus, et nimium credulus verbis conjugis, iratus est valde :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִי֩ כִשְׁמֹ֨עַ אֲדֹנָ֜יו אֶת־דִּבְרֵ֣י אִשְׁתּ֗וֹ אֲשֶׁ֨ר דִּבְּרָ֤ה אֵלָיו֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר כַּדְּבָרִ֣ים הָאֵ֔לֶּה עָ֥שָׂה לִ֖י עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ וַיִּ֖חַר אַפּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: His master hearing these things, and giving too much credit to his wife's words, was very angry,
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska hänen isäntänsä kuuli emäntänsä sanat, kuin hän puhui hänelle, sanoen: niin on sinun palvelias tehnyt minulle, vihastui hän sangen kovin.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, when his master heard the words of his wife, which she spake unto him, saying, After this manner did thy servant to me; that his wrath was kindled.

verses.latin_vulgate: tradiditque Joseph in carcerem, ubi vincti regis custodiebantur, et erat ibi clausus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּח֩ אֲדֹנֵ֨י יוֹסֵ֜ף אֹת֗וֹ וַֽיִּתְּנֵ֙הוּ֙ אֶל־בֵּ֣ית הַסֹּ֔הַר מְק֕וֹם אֲשֶׁר־[אֲסִירֵ֥י] (אסורי) הַמֶּ֖לֶךְ אֲסוּרִ֑ים וַֽיְהִי־שָׁ֖ם בְּבֵ֥ית הַסֹּֽהַר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And cast Joseph into the prison, where the king's prisoners were kept, and he was there shut up.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen isäntänsä otti Josephin, ja pani vankihuoneesen, jossa kuninkaan vangit olivat: ja niin hän oli siellä vankihuoneessa.
verses.king_james: And Joseph’s master took him, and put him into the prison, a place where the king’s prisoners were bound: and he was there in the prison.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuit autem Dominus cum Joseph, et misertus illius dedit ei gratiam in conspectu principis carceris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֤י יְהֹוָה֙ אֶת־יוֹסֵ֔ף וַיֵּ֥ט אֵלָ֖יו חָ֑סֶד וַיִּתֵּ֣ן חִנּ֔וֹ בְּעֵינֵ֖י שַׂ֥ר בֵּית־הַסֹּֽהַר׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the Lord was with Joseph, and having mercy upon him gave him favour in the sight of the chief keeper of the prison:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Herra oli Josephin kanssa, ja käänsi laupiutensa hänen tykönsä; ja antoi hänen löytää armon vankihuoneen haltian edessä.
verses.king_james: But the Lord was with Joseph, and shewed him mercy, and gave him favour in the sight of the keeper of the prison.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui tradidit in manu illius universos vinctos qui in custodia tenebantur : et quidquid fiebat, sub ipso erat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּ֞ן שַׂ֤ר בֵּית־הַסֹּ֙הַר֙ בְּיַד־יוֹסֵ֔ף אֵ֚ת כׇּל־הָ֣אֲסִירִ֔ם אֲשֶׁ֖ר בְּבֵ֣ית הַסֹּ֑הַר וְאֵ֨ת כׇּל־אֲשֶׁ֤ר עֹשִׂים֙ שָׁ֔ם ה֖וּא הָיָ֥ה עֹשֶֽׂה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who delivered into his hand all the prisoners that were kept in custody: and whatsoever was done, was under him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin että hän antoi kaikki vangit vankihuoneessa Josephin käden alle, että kaikki mitä siellä tehtiin, se tehtiin hänen kauttansa.
verses.king_james: And the keeper of the prison committed to Joseph’s hand all the prisoners that were in the prison; and whatsoever they did there, he was the doer of it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nec noverat aliquid, cunctis ei creditis : Dominus enim erat cum illo, et omnia opera ejus dirigebat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֣ין ׀ שַׂ֣ר בֵּית־הַסֹּ֗הַר רֹאֶ֤ה אֶֽת־כׇּל־מְא֙וּמָה֙ בְּיָד֔וֹ בַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה אִתּ֑וֹ וַֽאֲשֶׁר־ה֥וּא עֹשֶׂ֖ה יְהֹוָ֥ה מַצְלִֽיחַ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Neither did he himself know any thing, having committed all things to him: for the Lord was with him, and made all that he did to prosper.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vankihuoneen haltia ei pitänyt mistään murhetta niistä, jotka hänen kädessänsä olivat; sillä Herra oli Josephin kanssa, ja mitä hän teki, antoi Herra menestyä.
verses.king_james: The keeper of the prison looked not to any thing that was under his hand; because the Lord was with him, and that which he did, the Lord made it to prosper.
